column7: Verify vehicle positions with stunt coordinator.
Smoke generators, helicopter flyover TBC. Backup: sc 45 interior.
2nd unit prep lighting for hero car.
Social media team may request 5 min interviews.

column2: Open lot south of hangar; all crew park in designated rows A–C. No vehicle access past safety cones.
Portable units (4) behind catering tent; flush inside hangar after 08:00
Box lunch delivery at 12:30 (pickup at tent). Coffee & water stations 24/7. $20 cash breakfast buyout if needed.

ALL CREW: no recordings/photos of unreleased vehicle without client approval.
Stunt driving rehearsals will be radio-announced; stay clear of Runway E during takes.
Sunblock, hats, and reuseable water bottles provided.
General call at 05:30 sharp – parking lot gate opens at 05:00.
NDA reminder on file; any breach may result in removal from set.
